name: Royaltone

overview.summary: Royaltone is a family-owned specialty chemical company founded in 1970 in El Paso, Texas, with unique expertise in suede, leather, and fur cleaning — a niche that no other major dry cleaning chemical supplier focuses on. Founded by Frank Lucenta, who developed proprietary leather cleaning methods and built a training academy around them. Acquired by LD Supply Company in 2019 for expanded southwest US distribution. Known for all-in-one detergent formulations, specialty spotters (Silk Magic, Ink Magic), and the only professional leather cleaning training program in the industry.
overview.historyAndReputation: Frank Lucenta founded Royaltone in 1970 with a focus on what other chemical companies ignored — leather, suede, and fur cleaning. He developed proprietary methods, formulated products specifically for these materials, and built a training academy to teach dry cleaners how to process leather and fur profitably. For 40+ years, Royaltone has been the go-to name when a dry cleaner needs to handle leather or suede. The 2019 acquisition by LD Supply expanded distribution while maintaining the product line.
overview.marketPosition: Niche/specialty, premium pricing. Royaltone doesn't compete head-to-head with R.R. Street or A.L. Wilson across all categories — they own the leather/suede/fur specialty space. No other dry cleaning chemical company offers comparable leather cleaning products, training, or expertise. Their general dry cleaning products (ULTRATONE, spotters) are secondary to their leather/fur specialty.

specialties: Suede, leather, and fur cleaning chemistry (40+ years)

productLines.categoryDescription: Royaltone's detergents are all-in-one formulations — each product combines detergent, sizing, anti-static, softener, deodorizer, and antimicrobial in a single product. This reduces the number of chemicals a shop needs to stock and simplifies processing.

products.name: All-in-One Double Strength Injection Detergent
products.description: Complete dry cleaning detergent with built-in fresh scent, deodorizer, anti-static, sizing, brightener, and corrosion inhibitor. Eliminates static shock, reduces reruns and harsh pre-scrubbing, neutralizes bad odors. Double-strength concentration means lower per-load cost.
products.proTips: The all-in-one approach means fewer separate chemicals to buy, store, and dose. Good for smaller shops that want simplicity without sacrificing quality. The corrosion inhibitor protects machine components.
products.alternativeTo: Multiple separate products: detergent + sizing + anti-static + deodorizer
products.availability: direct from Royaltone and through LD Supply network

products.name: ULTRATONE
products.description: Anionic charge detergent with built-in sizing and microbicide. Color stabilization prevents color loss during cleaning. Eliminates swales and blotches on silk. Works well on down-filled items. 100% active ingredients — no fillers. The premium detergent in Royaltone's line.
fibers: all — specifically noted safe for silk and down
products.proTips: ULTRATONE's color stabilization is its differentiator. If a shop handles a lot of bright or dark-colored garments where dye loss is a concern, ULTRATONE protects against color bleeding during cleaning. The silk-safe formulation (no swales or blotches) makes it useful for shops with significant silk volume.
products.availability: direct from Royaltone and through LD Supply network

productLines.categoryDescription: Royaltone's spotters are targeted at specific problem stain types. Their standout products address stains that other companies' spotters handle poorly — water rings on silk and ink on leather.

products.name: Silk Magic
products.description: Removes water rings, raindrops, perspiration rings, streaks, swales, and soil from silk, rayon, and other water-sensitive fabrics. Functions as both a spotter and a leveling agent — it prevents and removes the water marks that are the most common damage on moisture-sensitive fabrics. Non-hazardous formulation. Eliminates reruns and after-treatments.
products.proTips: Silk Magic solves the most common silk problem — water marks. Water rings on silk are caused by localized moisture disrupting the fiber surface tension, creating visible marks where the moisture boundary was. Silk Magic re-levels the surface and eliminates the marks. Keep a bottle on every spotting board that handles silk volume.
products.availability: direct from Royaltone and through LD Supply network

products.name: Ink Magic
products.description: Clings to the ink spot without spreading the stain — a critical feature since most ink solvents cause ink to bleed outward during treatment. Removes all ink types quickly and completely. Compatible with both wet cleaning and dry cleaning. Works on suede, leather, and cloth — the leather compatibility is unique to Royaltone.
products.proTips: The non-spreading formulation is key. Standard ink solvents dissolve ink and it migrates through the fabric, creating a larger stain. Ink Magic's viscosity keeps the dissolved ink contained to the application area. Especially important on leather where ink migration means permanent damage.
products.availability: direct from Royaltone and through LD Supply network

products.name: Oil/Grease Spotter
products.description: Removes tar, shoe polish, wax, paint, varnish, rubber, resins, cosmetics, oxidized oils, and grease. Claims no rings, no streaks, no swales, no graying after treatment.
products.proTips: The 'no rings, no streaks, no swales' claim means the formulation is designed to feather evenly — no hard edges left behind. Important on dark fabrics where solvent rings are most visible.
products.alternativeTo: R.R. Street PICRIN®, A.L. Wilson TarGo®
products.availability: direct from Royaltone and through LD Supply network

products.name: Blood & Protein Remover
products.description: Multipurpose protein stain spotter for blood, perspiration, milk, eggs, glue, gravy, ketchup, albumin, salad dressing, vomit, urine, mercurochrome, and chocolate. Safe for delicate colors and fabrics. Works in both wet and dry cleaning.
products.proTips: Covers a broad range of protein stains including some unusual ones (mercurochrome, glue). Safe for delicates makes it versatile across fabric types.
products.alternativeTo: A.L. Wilson QwikGo®, R.R. Street StreePRO®
products.availability: direct from Royaltone and through LD Supply network

productLines.categoryDescription: Royaltone's core specialty — products specifically formulated for cleaning leather, suede, and fur. No other major dry cleaning chemical company offers this level of leather-specific chemistry.

products.name: Leather Wet Cleaning Detergent
products.description: Formulated for washing suede and leather garments in standard washing machines. Removes soil and stains without stiffening or hardening leather — the most common problem when leather contacts water. Professional-grade, designed for commercial leather cleaning operations.
notFor: standard textiles — use standard detergent instead
products.proTips: Leather stiffens when water strips its natural oils and the collagen fibers bond together during drying. This detergent includes emollients that maintain leather suppleness throughout the wash cycle. Critical for preventing the #1 leather cleaning complaint: stiff, cardboard-like results.
products.alternativeTo: Kreussler LANADOL LICKER (post-cleaning conditioner, different approach)
products.availability: direct from Royaltone and through LD Supply network

products.name: UGG Boot Cleaning Kit
products.description: Cleaning system designed specifically for UGG boots in standard washing machines. A niche consumer/professional product that reflects the growing market for specialty footwear care.
products.proTips: UGG boot cleaning is a profitable add-on service for dry cleaners. Customers pay premium prices for professional cleaning of expensive footwear. Royaltone's kit makes it accessible to any shop with a washing machine.
products.availability: direct from Royaltone — trial size available

agentMapping.NSD: All-in-One Injection Detergent (includes NSD-like cleaning action), ULTRATONE (anionic charge)
agentMapping.leveling: Silk Magic (functions as leveling agent for water-sensitive fabrics)
agentMapping.solvent: Royaltone does not manufacture dry cleaning solvents

fiberExpertise.silk: ULTRATONE specifically eliminates swales and blotches on silk. Silk Magic is the go-to product for water rings and moisture damage on silk. Royaltone has strong silk capabilities relative to its small size.
fiberExpertise.wool: Blood & Protein Remover is safe for delicates including wool. General dry cleaning products compatible. No wool-specific products.
fiberExpertise.leather: Royaltone's primary expertise. Leather Wet Cleaning Detergent prevents stiffening during wash. Ink Magic works on leather (unique). Training academy teaches leather cleaning methods. No other company profiled matches Royaltone's leather/suede depth.
fiberExpertise.synthetics: Standard product compatibility. No special synthetic-specific products.
fiberExpertise.delicates: Silk Magic is the standout — purpose-built for the most common delicate fabric problem (water marks). ULTRATONE's color stabilization protects delicate dyes.

protocols.name: Royaltone Leather Cleaning Protocol
protocols.description: Professional leather/suede cleaning using Royaltone's specialized products and training methodology. 1) Inspect garment for damage, color issues, and stain types. 2) Pre-spot with appropriate spotter (Ink Magic for ink, Blood & Protein for protein stains). 3) Wash with Leather Wet Cleaning Detergent in standard washing machine on gentle cycle. 4) Controlled drying — never high heat. 5) Finishing and conditioning. Developed by Frank Lucenta over 40+ years, taught through Royaltone's training academy.
protocols.usedFor: Professional cleaning of leather, suede, and fur garments

protocols.name: Silk Water Ring Removal
protocols.description: Apply Silk Magic to affected area, working from the outside edge of the water ring inward. The product re-levels the surface tension disruption that causes the visible mark. No flushing needed — Silk Magic evaporates or can be cleaned away in the dry cleaning cycle.
protocols.usedFor: Water rings, raindrop marks, perspiration rings on silk and rayon

distributionNetwork.distributionMethod: direct sales and through LD Supply Company network
distributionNetwork.howToBuy: Contact Royaltone directly at their El Paso, TX headquarters (3800 Durazno Ave., El Paso, TX 79905) or through LD Supply Company, their parent distributor serving the southwest US.

strengthsKnownFor: Unmatched leather, suede, and fur cleaning expertise (40+ years)
Only professional leather cleaning training academy in the industry
Silk Magic — purpose-built solution for the most common silk problem
Ink Magic — non-spreading ink remover that works on leather
All-in-one formulations reduce chemical inventory complexity
Founder (Frank Lucenta) credibility as inventor and educator
limitations: Small company with limited geographic distribution (primarily southwest US)
No dedicated tannin spotter, rust remover, or enzyme product
Training available only via DVD and written manual (not modern online platform)
Limited online presence and product information
Narrow product line compared to full-service suppliers like R.R. Street or Kreussler
industryReputation.whoUsesThem: Dry cleaners who process leather, suede, and fur garments. Shops looking to add leather cleaning as a profitable specialty service. Operations handling significant silk volume (Silk Magic). Southwest US operators near LD Supply's distribution area. Cleaners seeking all-in-one detergent simplicity.
rivalCompanies: Kreussler Inc. (leather finishing via LANADOL LICKER)
no direct competitor in leather/suede specialty

education.trainingResources: Royaltone Leather Cleaning Training Academy — 5.5-hour DVD instruction modules covering wet washing and dry cleaning of suede, leather, and fur. Includes full written manual and final exam. Taught by Frank Lucenta (founder/inventor). UGG boot cleaning specialization available.
education.technicalSupport: Direct support from Royaltone's El Paso headquarters. LD Supply Company provides additional distribution and support in southwest US.
education.publications: Training manual included with academy enrollment. Product-specific documentation.

gonrIntegration.relevance: Royaltone fills two specific gaps that no other supplier covers: 1) Professional leather/suede/fur cleaning chemistry (when GONR protocols recommend professional treatment for leather stains), and 2) Water ring removal on silk (Silk Magic — when GONR protocols address water damage on silk garments). These are niche but high-value situations.
gonrIntegration.agentCrossReference: When a GONR protocol calls for: leather cleaning → Royaltone Leather Wet Cleaning Detergent; silk water ring removal → Silk Magic; ink removal on leather → Ink Magic; protein spotter (safe for delicates) → Blood & Protein Remover; oil/grease spotter → Oil/Grease Spotter.
gonrIntegration.whenToRecommend: Recommend Royaltone when: the protocol involves leather, suede, or fur cleaning; the problem is water rings on silk; ink has stained a leather garment; or the operator wants to add leather cleaning as a specialty service (Royaltone's training academy).
